seo.title: Ixercise - Your Workout. Step by Step. Offline.
seo.description: Simple offline workout app for iOS. No account, no cloud, no tracking. Just your workout, step by step.
seo.schemaDescription: Simple offline workout app for iOS. No account, no cloud, no tracking.

hero.description: Create your own workout routine and follow it step by step: reps, timers, rests, and reminders. Works fully offline on iPhone.

inlineWaitlist.heading: Want to try it when it’s ready?

philosophy.title: Not another fitness tracker.
philosophy.copy: Just your workout, step by step. We believe fitness apps should help you exercise, not distract you with features you never asked for.

features.title: Simple by design.
features.copy: Everything you need for your workout routine. Nothing you don't.

offline.title: Fully Offline
offline.description: Works without internet. Your workouts stay on your device.

noAccount.title: No Account
noAccount.description: Start immediately. No sign-up, no login, no email required.

repsTimers.title: Reps & Timers
repsTimers.description: Support for both rep-based and timer-based exercises.

restCountdown.title: Rest Countdown
restCountdown.description: Built-in rest timers between sets with adjustable duration.

reminders.title: Reminders
reminders.description: Schedule your workouts with customizable notifications.

liveActivities.title: Live Activities
liveActivities.description: Lock Screen widgets and Dynamic Island support on iOS.

themes.title: Dark & Light
themes.description: Beautiful in any lighting. Automatic theme switching.

openSource.title: Open Source
openSource.description: Free forever. View the code on GitHub.

waitlist.title: Get early access to Ixercise.
waitlist.copy: Get one email when Ixercise is ready to try.
waitlist.reason: I’m checking if enough people actually want this app before publishing it to the App Store. Leave your email if you’d try a simple offline workout runner for iPhone.
waitlist.microcopy: No spam — just one launch email.
waitlist.notePlaceholder: Optional: platform, preferred language, or what you want from the app
waitlist.success: You're on the waitlist. I'll email you when Ixercise is ready.
waitlist.error: Something went wrong. Please try again in a moment.

footer.title: Ready to simplify your workout?
footer.copy: Join the waitlist for the free launch. No sign up, no subscription, no nonsense.
